title: Modern Kitchen Overhaul
short_description: A complete kitchen transformation featuring custom white shaker cabinets, quartz countertops, and a spacious island with seating.
description: This dated kitchen was remodeled by a previous owner.  Because the quality of work was below city code, we completely gutted and rebuilt this kitchen and several additional parts of this home with a truly open and modern layout. Our goal was to deliver a bright, functional space for cooking and entertaining. We installed custom built, two tone shaker cabinets, quartz countertops, a large island with bar seating, and new hardwood flooring throughout.
